error_signature: the item has no binary field data
title: Binary field 'data' not found in GPT Vision node
symptom: When executing the GPT Vision node, it throws an error stating 'the item has no binary field data'. This indicates that the expected binary field is not present.
applies_when: Input Type set to Binary Fields
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node
root_cause: The error occurs because the specified binary field name 'data' does not match the actual key used to store binary data in n8n. The label 'File Name: data' can be misleading, as it refers to the filename rather than the binary field key.
fix_steps: Open the GPT Vision node settings
Change the 'Input Data Field Name' from 'data' to 'Binary'
agent_instruction: Update the 'Input Data Field Name' in the GPT Vision node to 'Binary' and save the workflow.
